name: Minor Health Potion
description: A small vial of red liquid. Restores a bit of health.

name: Leather Scrap Bandage
description: Makeshift bandages from old leather. Not great, but better than bleeding.

name: Health Potion
description: A standard healing draught. Tastes like mushroom soup.

name: Greater Health Potion
description: A large flask of potent healing liquid. Glows faintly.

name: Fungal Elixir
description: A shimmering elixir distilled from rare bioluminescent fungi.

name: Volatile Spore Pod
description: A bulging spore pod that explodes on impact. Handle with care.

name: Crushed Crystal Dust
description: A handful of finely ground crystal. When inhaled, it sharpens the senses painfully.

name: Prismatic Flask
description: A potion that shimmers with every color. Restores body and mind.

name: Shatter Bomb
description: A fragile crystal sphere packed with pressurized shards. Explodes violently on impact.

name: Brine Tonic
description: A concentrated salt solution that stings going down but closes wounds fast.

name: Sea Foam Salve
description: A thick paste of crushed shells and sea foam. Numbs pain on contact.

name: Depth Charge
description: A sealed bladder of compressed gas from the deep. Detonates with concussive force.

name: Marrow Paste
description: A thick paste extracted from ancient bones. Smells awful, heals well.

name: Spirit Draught
description: A ghostly liquid in a bone vial. It evaporates as you drink it, but the healing is real.

name: Bone Shard Bomb
description: A hollowed skull packed with razor-sharp bone fragments. Gruesome but effective.

name: Magma Salve
description: A paste that burns, then heals. The process is agonizing but effective.

name: Volcanic Tonic
description: A bubbling red liquid that tastes like liquid fire. Restores vigor rapidly.

name: Volatile Fire Bomb
description: A clay pot filled with a volatile alchemical mixture. Shatters into a ball of flame.

name: Superior Elixir
description: A masterfully brewed potion of extraordinary potency. Shimmers with golden light.

name: Crude Bandage
description: A strip of torn cloth. Better than nothing for stanching a wound.

name: Cave Moss Poultice
description: A wad of damp cave moss packed with healing herbs. Apply directly to wounds.

name: Rot-Gut Flask
description: A dented tin flask of foul homebrew. Numbs everything, including the pain.
